title: Pumpkin Ghasts
body:
## About
My first ever resource pack, "Pumpkin Ghasts" is rather self-explanatory, but just in case you haven't got it yet, this pack changes the default ghast texture to the Jack-O'Lantern textures (turns on when the ghasts shoot).\
I spent a long time painstakingly editing the ghast textures pixel by pixel (I'm dumb and couldn't find a copy texture button lol), so I hope you enjoy!

That's about it, have fun ;-).

---

*Made using [Nova Skin Resource Pack Creator](https://minecraft.novaskin.me/resourcepacks)*
